title: Sunday Lazy Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe for a relaxing Sunday morning. Perfect for a lazy brunch.
instructions: 1. In a small pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the mixed greens and cherry tomatoes, stir-fry until the greens are wilted.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and pepper.
4. Add the eggs to the pan and scramble them with the vegetables.
5. Add the shredded mozzarella cheese and stir until melted.
6. Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with chopped herbs if desired.
7. In a separate pan, melt the butter over low heat.
8. Pour the melted butter over the stir fry and serve.
